subcodes.first_line: I have perused the contents of the letter and am deeply grieved by the severe tribulations that have befallen thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اطلعت بمضمون الخطاب و حزنت علی ما اصابک من شدید العقاب
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
